support.title: Malo Othandizira

footer.description: Kuyambitsa mapulogalamu oyambira omwe ali ku Sarajevo, Bosnia. Timamanga mapulogalamu achizolowezi, njira za AI / ML, zomangamanga zamtambo, ndi machitidwe okhazikika.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Horizon Tech. Maumwini onse ndi otetezedwa.

header.description: Kuchokera pakupanga mapulogalamu ogwira ntchito komanso nzeru zamalonda zoyendetsedwa ndi AI kupita ku zomangamanga zamtambo ndi njira za IoT - timapereka ntchito zamakono zomwe zimayendetsa zatsopano ndikufulumizitsa kukula.

caseStudies.title: Maphunziro Aposachedwa
caseStudies.description: Chithunzithunzi cha zotsatira zoperekera kudutsa fintech, zaumoyo, kayendetsedwe ka zinthu, ndi mapulogalamu aboma.

blog.title: Zatsopano Kuchokera ku Blog Yathu
blog.description: Zolemba zothandiza zomangamanga kuchokera ku AI yaposachedwa, nsanja, ndi ntchito yoperekera mtambo.

innovationLab.title: Innovation Lab
innovationLab.description: Fufuzani ma prototypes, kuyesera, ndi ntchito zogwiritsidwa ntchito za R &D kuchokera ku gulu la zomangamanga la Horizon Tech.
